chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.D-09 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.02.2019 Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. alongwith Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad, SIP Roshan Ali on behalf of S.H.O P.S Jamshoro and SIP Syed Latif Ali Shah on behalf of DSP Kotri...... Alleged detainee Farooque-e-Azam alias Babar is present and submits that he is son of applicant Mst. Jannat Khatoon and that all the detainees have surfaced and that they were illegally detained by the police. Learned Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh has submitted that since all the detainees have surfaced, this Application has served its purpose. This Application was filed in the nature of habeas corpus and since all the alleged detainees have surfaced, the same having served its purpose has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of. However, if the applicant has any grievance against the respondents for illegally detaining them and has sufficient material in support thereof, she may file proper proceedings before the proper forum against the respondents. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
